name: puppet-show
description: Contract-bound puppets for Claude Code — every subagent dispatch carries a machine-verifiable contract, validated at runtime and return time.

plugins.name: puppet-show
plugins.description: Contract-bound puppets for Claude Code. Every Task() dispatch ships with a YAML contract (scope_in, scope_out, tools, return_format). PreToolUse hooks validate or block scope/tool violations at runtime; PostToolUse hooks validate the return format and per-finding evidence. Live SSE dashboard + CLI audit/history/suggest. SQLite-backed, zero npm deps.
